statement_preview: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS missed_opportunity_audit_v1 ( audit_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT NOT NULL, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, reject_decision_uid TEXT, rejection_reason TEXT NOT NULL, outcome_class TEXT NOT NULL, followup_window_blocks INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 28800, followup_window_hours INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 24, max_observed_multiple REAL, sell_route_available_later INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, honeypot_later INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, tax_trap_later INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, l

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS rejected_token_followup_queue_v1 ( queue_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT NOT NULL, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, rejection_reason TEXT NOT NULL, followup_status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'QUEUED_LOW_PRIORITY', priority_lane TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'LOW', first_rejected_block INTEGER, next_check_block INTEGER, last_checked_block INTEGER, checks_done INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, max_checks_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 288, sync_interval_blocks INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 100

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS opportunity_outcome_snapshot_v1 ( snapshot_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, audit_uid TEXT NOT NULL, token_uid TEXT NOT NULL, pair_uid TEXT, observed_block INTEGER, observed_at_utc TEXT, max_observed_multiple REAL, sell_route_available INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, honeypot_flag INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, tax_trap_flag INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, lp_remove_flag INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, liquidity_exit_possible INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, raw_evidence_json TEXT, created_at_utc TE

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS avoided_loss_events_v1 ( event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, audit_uid TEXT, token_uid TEXT, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, loss_type TEXT NOT NULL, estimated_avoided_loss_usd REAL DEFAULT 0, secondary_metric_only INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, pays_infrastructure_bill INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, evidence_json TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL );

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS commercial_policy_review_events_v1 ( review_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, audit_uid TEXT NOT NULL, review_reason TEXT NOT NULL, severity TEXT NOT NULL, system_too_strict_flag INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, trade_permission_granted INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, review_status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'REVIEW_REQUIRED', created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL );

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS commercial_roi_score_inputs_v1 ( score_input_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, period_uid TEXT, metric_name TEXT NOT NULL, metric_class TEXT NOT NULL, metric_value REAL, pays_infrastructure_bill INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, primary_cashflow_metric INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, secondary_defense_metric INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL );
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_missed_opp_token ON missed_opportunity_audit_v1(token_uid);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_missed_opp_pair ON missed_opportunity_audit_v1(pair_uid);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_missed_opp_class ON missed_opportunity_audit_v1(outcome_class);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_missed_opp_policy_review ON missed_opportunity_audit_v1(policy_review_required);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_rejected_queue_status ON rejected_token_followup_queue_v1(followup_status);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_rejected_queue_next_block ON rejected_token_followup_queue_v1(next_check_block);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_rejected_queue_priority ON rejected_token_followup_queue_v1(priority_lane);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_outcome_snapshot_token_block ON opportunity_outcome_snapshot_v1(token_uid, observed_block);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_outcome_snapshot_multiple ON opportunity_outcome_snapshot_v1(max_observed_multiple);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_avoided_loss_type ON avoided_loss_events_v1(loss_type);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_policy_review_status ON commercial_policy_review_events_v1(review_status);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_roi_score_period ON commercial_roi_score_inputs_v1(period_uid, metric_class);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS risk_tier_capital_policy_v1 ( policy_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, tier INTEGER NOT NULL, tier_name TEXT NOT NULL, route TEXT NOT NULL, capital_permission_now_usd REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, future_capital_permission_usd REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, paper_now INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, live_now INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, hard_block_bypass INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, averaging_down INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL );

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS micro_budget_policy_v1 ( budget_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, budget_key TEXT NOT NULL, value_usd REAL NOT NULL, active_now INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, requires_future_plan INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, requires_explicit_approval INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL );

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS risk_tier_transition_policy_v1 ( transition_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, rule_key TEXT NOT NULL, from_tier TEXT NOT NULL, to_tier TEXT NOT NULL, conditions_json TEXT NOT NULL, permission_granted_now INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL );
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_risk_tier_policy_tier ON risk_tier_capital_policy_v1(tier);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_risk_tier_policy_route ON risk_tier_capital_policy_v1(route);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_micro_budget_key ON micro_budget_policy_v1(budget_key);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_tier_transition_rule ON risk_tier_transition_policy_v1(rule_key);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS asymmetric_micro_observation_policy_v1 ( policy_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, route_key TEXT NOT NULL, tier INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 2, observation_only INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, paper_now INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, live_now INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, runtime_now INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, capital_now INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, hard_block_bypass INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, averaging_down INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, rescue_entry INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, created_at_utc

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS asymmetric_micro_observation_events_v1 ( event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, token_uid TEXT NOT NULL, pair_uid TEXT, chain TEXT, observation_status TEXT NOT NULL, primary_block_reason TEXT, next_required_evidence TEXT, executable_opportunity_score REAL DEFAULT 0, grants_trade_permission INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, safe_sentence TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'işlem izni yok', created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL );

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS asymmetric_micro_guard_results_v1 ( guard_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, event_uid TEXT NOT NULL, guard_name TEXT NOT NULL, guard_passed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, failure_effect TEXT, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL );
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_asym_obs_policy_tier ON asymmetric_micro_observation_policy_v1(tier);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_asym_obs_event_token ON asymmetric_micro_observation_events_v1(token_uid);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_asym_obs_event_status ON asymmetric_micro_observation_events_v1(observation_status);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_asym_guard_event ON asymmetric_micro_guard_results_v1(event_uid);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_asym_guard_name ON asymmetric_micro_guard_results_v1(guard_name);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS commercial_scoreboard_periods_v1 ( period_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, period_start_utc TEXT NOT NULL, period_end_utc TEXT NOT NULL, period_type TEXT NOT NULL, annual_cost_min_usd REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 1500.0, annual_cost_max_usd REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 2000.0, monthly_break_even_min_usd REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 125.0, monthly_break_even_max_usd REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 166.67, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL );

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS commercial_scoreboard_metrics_v1 ( metric_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, period_uid TEXT NOT NULL, metric_name TEXT NOT NULL, metric_class TEXT NOT NULL, metric_value REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, pays_infrastructure_bill INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, can_mark_commercial_success INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, priority INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 99, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL );

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS commercial_scoreboard_alerts_v1 ( alert_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, period_uid TEXT, alert_key TEXT NOT NULL, severity TEXT NOT NULL, condition_text TEXT NOT NULL, trade_permission INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL );

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS net_commercial_score_v1 ( score_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, period_uid TEXT NOT NULL, net_commercial_performance_score REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, cost_recovery_progress_pct REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, cashflow_component_usd REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, executable_opportunity_component REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, avoided_loss_component_usd REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, missed_opportunity_penalty REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, avoided_loss_secondary_only INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, created_at_utc TE
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_scoreboard_period_type ON commercial_scoreboard_periods_v1(period_type);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_scoreboard_metric_period ON commercial_scoreboard_metrics_v1(period_uid);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_scoreboard_metric_name ON commercial_scoreboard_metrics_v1(metric_name);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_scoreboard_alert_period ON commercial_scoreboard_alerts_v1(period_uid);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_scoreboard_alert_key ON commercial_scoreboard_alerts_v1(alert_key);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_net_commercial_score_period ON net_commercial_score_v1(period_uid);
